properties.name: l402.enabled
properties.description: Whether L402 payment-gated access is enabled. When false, the L402 security filter is not registered and all endpoints are accessible without payment.

properties.name: l402.backend
properties.description: Lightning Network backend to use for invoice creation and payment verification. Must match a configured backend module on the classpath.

properties.name: l402.default-price-sats
properties.description: Default price in satoshis charged for L402-protected endpoints. Individual endpoints can override this via @L402Protected annotation or a custom L402PricingStrategy.

properties.name: l402.default-timeout-seconds
properties.description: Default invoice expiry timeout in seconds. The Lightning invoice will expire and become unpayable after this duration.

properties.name: l402.service-name
properties.description: Logical name of the service, embedded in macaroon caveats for service-scoped authorization. Used by ServicesCaveatVerifier to restrict tokens to specific services.

properties.name: l402.root-key-store
properties.description: Root key storage backend for macaroon signing keys. 'file' persists keys to disk; 'memory' keeps keys in-memory (lost on restart).

properties.name: l402.root-key-store-path
properties.description: File system path for the file-based root key store. Only used when l402.root-key-store=file. The directory is created automatically if it does not exist.

properties.name: l402.credential-cache
properties.description: Credential cache implementation to use for storing validated L402 credentials. 'caffeine' requires the Caffeine library on the classpath; 'none' disables caching.

properties.name: l402.credential-cache-max-size
properties.description: Maximum number of validated credentials to cache. Only applies when l402.credential-cache=caffeine. Higher values use more memory but reduce re-verification overhead.

properties.name: l402.security-mode
properties.description: Security mode controlling which L402 authentication path is active. 'auto' (default) detects Spring Security on the classpath and uses spring-security mode if present. 'servlet' forces the L402SecurityFilter servlet path. 'spring-security' forces the Spring Security integration path.

properties.name: l402.test-mode
properties.description: Enable test mode which uses an in-memory Lightning backend that auto-settles invoices. Must NOT be used in production. When enabled, no real Lightning node connection is required.

properties.name: l402.trust-forwarded-headers
properties.description: Whether to trust X-Forwarded-For headers for client IP resolution. When false (default), the filter always uses the direct connection remote address, preventing rate-limit bypass via header spoofing. Enable only when running behind a trusted reverse proxy.

properties.name: l402.rate-limit.requests-per-second
properties.description: Token refill rate per second for the challenge rate limiter. Controls the sustained request rate allowed per client IP before 402 challenges are throttled.

properties.name: l402.rate-limit.burst-size
properties.description: Maximum burst size (token bucket capacity) for the challenge rate limiter. Allows short bursts of requests above the sustained rate before throttling kicks in.

properties.name: l402.lnbits.url
properties.description: Base URL of the LNbits instance (e.g., https://lnbits.example.com). Required when l402.backend=lnbits.

properties.name: l402.lnbits.api-key
properties.description: LNbits admin API key for invoice creation and payment lookup. Required when l402.backend=lnbits. Keep this value secret.

properties.name: l402.lnd.host
properties.description: Hostname or IP address of the LND gRPC endpoint. Required when l402.backend=lnd.

properties.name: l402.lnd.port
properties.description: Port number of the LND gRPC endpoint.

properties.name: l402.lnd.tls-cert-path
properties.description: File system path to the LND TLS certificate (tls.cert). Required when l402.backend=lnd for secure gRPC connections.

properties.name: l402.lnd.macaroon-path
properties.description: File system path to the LND admin macaroon file (admin.macaroon). Required when l402.backend=lnd for authenticated gRPC calls.

values.description: Auto-detect: use spring-security mode if Spring Security is on the classpath, otherwise use servlet mode.
Force servlet filter mode. L402SecurityFilter handles all authentication and challenge issuance.
Force Spring Security mode. Uses L402AuthenticationFilter and L402AuthenticationEntryPoint within the Spring Security filter chain.
Use LNbits REST API as the Lightning backend.
Use LND gRPC as the Lightning backend.
Persist root keys to the file system at the configured path.
Keep root keys in memory only. Keys are lost on application restart.
Use Caffeine as the credential cache. Requires com.github.ben-manes.caffeine:caffeine on the classpath.
Disable credential caching. Every request re-verifies the macaroon and preimage.
